greeting: Hello, thank you for calling [Business Name]. This is our automated assistant. How can I help you today?

flow.purpose: Understand why caller is reaching out
prompts: I'd be happy to help with that. Are you looking to schedule something or do you have questions about our services?
Great, let me ask a couple quick questions to make sure I connect you with the right person.

responses.scheduling_interest: Perfect! Before we book anything, what type of service are you interested in?
responses.questions_only: Of course! What would you like to know more about?

prompts: When were you looking to get started?
Do you have a budget range in mind for this project?

responses.ready_soon: That's great timing. Let me check our availability.
responses.just_browsing: No problem at all. I can still show you what we offer and answer any questions.

prompts: I have availability on Tuesday at 2 PM or Thursday at 10 AM. Which works better for you?
What's your name and best email address for the confirmation?

responses.time_confirmed: Perfect! I've scheduled your appointment for [date/time]. You'll receive a calendar invitation shortly.

closing: Is there anything else I can help you with today? Thank you for calling [Business Name]!
notes: Keep qualification questions brief - max 2-3 questions
If caller seems rushed, skip to booking immediately
Always confirm appointment details before ending call
